description: Held-out validation split for edit-reliability — 8 small/medium single-bug textkit repos across distinct archetypes NOT in the train suite (missing-export, empty-boundary, off-by-one slice, inverted-clamp, reduce-init, wrong-key groupBy, missing-NaN-guard, wrong-direction findLast). Each target file has multiple functions so the model must localize. NEVER used for prompt/harness optimization; reserved for measuring generalization (e.g. GEPA candidates).
